goal: Promote visible node id filtering into a documented headless adapter contract without implementing a real spatial index or adding renderer dependencies.
checkpoints: after JVE-020 visible node runtime contract passes
after JVE-040 package closeout gates pass
side_effect_policy: User authorized autonomous commits in this session; commit only verified bounded work, do not push, and do not revert unrelated user changes.
stop_conditions: visible node contract requires DOM, renderer, wgpu, egui, Fret, screenshot, or pixel dependency inside jellyflow-core or jellyflow-runtime
real spatial index backend becomes necessary before the stable contract exists
visible edge culling broadens the first visible node contract
